message:
fix(demo): register content pane hit area and fix hit grid cache clearing

Two fixes for mouse interaction handling in the demo app.

Hit area registration:
- Register the content pane inner area for hit testing
- Enables proper mouse event routing to screen content
- Uses chrome::register_pane_hit() with current screen ID
- Previously only the outer block was considered for hits

Cache clearing fix:
- Fix cache_hit_grid() to properly clear the cache when frame.hit_grid is None
- Previously, clearing None would leave stale hit grid data
- Now explicitly replaces with None when no hit grid present
- Prevents stale mouse hit data from persisting across frames

These fixes ensure consistent mouse interaction behavior:
- Clicks within content area now properly route to active screen
- Frame transitions properly clear hit detection state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
